expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
**Confirmed:**

- **Top unresolved Sentry issue:** `OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events` (highest event count among unresolved issues)
- **Email sent:** To `oncall@acme.io`, subject `Top error`, body containing the issue title above

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def unresolved-sentries (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"}))

(def top-issue (apply max-key :count unresolved-sentries))

(def issue-title (:title top-issue))

(insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body issue-title})

(println "Sent email with body:" issue-title)
(println "Issue had" (:count top-issue) "events"))"}
